title: KYB required materials
content: Typical KYB materials include Certificate of Incorporation, Certificate of Incumbency, bylaws or memorandum and articles, director or UBO passport, proof of address, and onboarding form. Certified true copies may be required by policy.

title: KYB status handling guide
content: When status is pending_review or in_review, guide the user to wait. When status is material_missing, list missing documents. When status is rejected, explain the reason and route to manual follow-up.

title: Wallet and transfer status guide
content: If no live API is configured, wallet and transfer responses must be labeled as documentation fallback instead of realtime status.

title: Certified true copy requirements
content: Certified true copy documents should contain a certification statement, signer identity, and professional license reference if required by policy.
